gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found a positional-compatibility issue from inserting repository_hygiene_output_json before native_probe_factories_output_json; the field was moved after the existing native-probe field, a regression test was added, and GPT-5.5 re-review approved.
scope: document_kv_cache.benchmark_plan CLI/config/record generation, benchmark-plan tests, README workflow documentation
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
what_changed: Benchmark plans can generate repository hygiene sidecars and auto-bundle them as release hygiene evidence.
why: Release bundle command plans should generate the repository hygiene evidence they need instead of requiring an out-of-band sidecar path.
